task.description: Repair parse_query so it parses a URL query string into a dict. Decode percent escapes and '+'. Repeated keys should collect values in a list. Keys without '=' have an empty string value.
Repair top_k_frequent so it returns the k most frequent values. Sort by descending frequency and preserve first-seen order for ties.
